WARNING: These test points are for A2681 (820-02536) ONLY. For other boards, use that board's diagnostic files. Component designators (C5704, C8450, C8440, etc.) are board-specific — the same rail appears at DIFFERENT components on other boards.
description: Known fault patterns from Safan diagnostic data (672 ammeter readings, 155 component records, 42 rail-specific fault notes). Mapped to specific circuits and rails from Phase 1/2 extraction.

faults.name: CD3217 (UF400/UF500) failure

symptoms.dcps_20v: 0.001A or normal (if only one port affected)

root_causes: CD3217 internal failure (only 5V, no PD negotiation)
Previous repair attempt with wrong CD3217 variant
faults.fix: Replace CD3217 (UF400 or UF500). Ensure matching ROM.
data_examples: 5V/0.004A → UF400 + ROM short → replaced CD + ROM → fixed
5V/0.0A → UF400, UF500, CF400, CF408 liquid damage → cleaned + replaced
20V/0.001A → UF400 charging not working (only one side)

faults.name: PP3V8_AON short (VDDMAIN / SPMU_ISNS)

symptoms.dcps_5v: 0.05-0.5A (draws moderate current but board doesn't boot)

root_causes: Component under PP3V8_AON line pulling it to ground
faults.fix: Identify shorted cap via diode mode or thermal cam. Remove shorted cap. If short clears, replace cap. If short persists, trace to IC pulling the line down.

faults.name: PPBUS_AON short
root_causes: Liquid damage on main bus trace
Shorted component pulling bus to ground
faults.fix: Diode mode on PPBUS_AON. Find shorted cap. Remove and retest.

faults.name: PP3V3_S2 / PP3V3_S2_LDO short
root_causes: Cap short on PP3V3_S2 LDO output
CD3217 internal LDO short pulling PP3V3_UPC down
faults.fix: Diode mode on PP3V3_S2 line. If CF660 shorted → remove and retest. If PP3V3_UPC0/1_LDO shorted → CD3217 internal fault.
data_examples: 5V/0.223A → PP3V3_UPC1_LDO + PP3V3_S2 short → CD chip fault

faults.name: U8100 (MPMU) failure
faults.affected_rail: All MPMU outputs (PP1V8_AON_MPMU, PP1V2_AON_MPMU, PP3V3_S2M_SNR, etc.)
root_causes: Liquid damage on MPMU BGA pads
Downstream short loading MPMU outputs → MPMU shuts down
faults.fix: If multiple LDO outputs missing → replace U8100. If single output missing → find downstream short on that rail, thermal cam.

faults.name: SSD / NAND power fault
faults.fix: Check NAND power rails. Check fuses FL4000/FL4001. If SSD power IC shorted → replace.
data_examples: 20V/0.7A → C9586 SSD power IC short → capacitor short found

faults.name: PP5V_S2 (UC300) path fault

symptoms.dcps_5v: 0.01-0.04A (5V rail not coming up, downstream not powered)

faults.fix: Check C8430 diode mode. Check L8430 for open. Replace faulty component. If both OK → UC300 or enable signal fault.
faults.diagnostic_workflow: Ricky's step 3: C8440→5V? NO → check C8430 (diode, shorted?) and L8430 (diode, OL/open?)

faults.name: Liquid damage — multiple component failure
faults.frequency: ~40% of all fault records mention liquid damage
faults.affected_rail: Multiple — depends on liquid ingress location
faults.fix: Clean logic board thoroughly (IPA + ultrasonic if available). Identify all shorts. Fix one at a time, retesting after each repair. Multiple component replacement often needed.
data_examples: 5V/0.01A → liquid damage, hall sensor damage, both CD chips, multiple caps
5V/0.019A → UR760, UR730, UR700, CR765, CR764, CR753 — extensive liquid damage repair
5V/0.035A → UP800, QP801, UP900 — multiple IC replacement needed

faults.name: PP1V8_AON short → UC870 suspect
root_causes: UC870 internal short pulling PP1V8_AON to ground
faults.fix: Thermal cam on PP1V8_AON rail → if UC870 is hot, replace UC870.

faults.name: I2C bus fault → peripheral not responding
root_causes: I2C line shorted to ground by faulty peripheral
test_points: Check pull-up resistors on affected I2C bus
faults.fix: Isolate which I2C device is pulling bus low. Remove suspect IC, check if bus recovers.
data_examples: 20V/0.3A → U5150 fault, I2C_SMC_SCL line short → battery showing 'service'
